questionText: Do your external asset managers have to meet environmental requirements as part of your organization's selection process and engagement?
questionKo: 외부 자산 관리자가 귀사의 선정 과정 및 참여의 일환으로 환경 요구 사항을 충족해야 합니까?
simpleHelp: For asset owners and asset managers working with external funds (third parties), the external asset managers have a significant effect on investment strategies and objectives. Including environmental requirements into the selection of and engagement with external asset managers ensures that these investment strategies and objectives are aligned with the organization's business strategy.

columns.text: External asset managers have to meet specific environmental requirements as part of the selection process and engagement
options: No, but we plan to include environmental requirements in the next two years
No, and we do not plan to include environmental requirements in the next two years
Not applicable, because we do not have externally managed assets
columns.textKo: 자산 충족 구체적인 환경 요구사항 의 일부로 프로세스 및
optionsKo: , 그러나 당사 계획 포함 환경 요구사항 향후 2개 연도
, 및 당사 아님 계획 포함 환경 요구사항 향후 2개 연도

columns.text: Policy in place for addressing external asset manager non-compliance
options: Yes, we have a policy in place for addressing non-compliance
No, we do not have a policy in place for addressing non-compliance
columns.textKo: 정책 보유 에 대한 자산 관리자
optionsKo: 예, 당사 a 정책 보유 에 대한
, 당사 아님 a 정책 보유 에 대한

columns.text: Primary reason for not including environmental requirements in selection process and engagement with external asset managers
options: Lack of internal resources, capabilities, or expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant or not relevant
columns.textKo: 주된 이유 에 대한 아님 포함 환경 요구사항 프로세스 및 와/과 자산

columns.text: Explain why environmental requirements are not included in selection process and engagement with external asset managers
columns.textKo: 설명 왜 환경 요구사항 아님 포함된 프로세스 및 와/과 자산

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in response to column 1 "Activity undertaken" for the rows "Investing (Asset manager)" and/or "Investing (Asset owner)" of 1.10.
guidance.textKo: 이 문항은 1.10의 "투자(자산 관리자)" 및/또는 "투자(자산 소유자)" 행에 대한 열 1 "수행된 활동"에 대한 응답으로 "예"를 선택한 경우에만 나타납니다.

guidance.text:
External asset managers have to meet specific environmental requirements as part of the selection process and engagement (column 1) 
Select "Yes" if the external asset managers that are part of your selection process and engagement have to meet specific environmental requirements.
Policy in place for addressing external asset manager non-compliance (column 2) 
This column is only shown if "Yes" is selected in column 1 "External asset managers have to meet specific environmental requirements as part of the selection process and engagement".
Select "Yes, we have a policy in place for addressing non-compliance" if you have an established policy to manage external asset managers who do not adhere to the environmental requirements within your selection process and engagement.
Explain why environmental requirements are not included in selection process and engagement with external asset managers (column 4) 
Your response should be specific to your organization and include why your organization does not consider environmental requirements when selecting and engaging with asset managers.
Briefly describe any plans you may have to address this in the future.
guidance.textKo:
외부 자산 관리자는 선정 프로세스 및 참여의 일부로 특정 환경 요구 사항을 충족해야 합니다(1열). 
선택 프로세스 및 참여의 일부인 외부 자산 관리자가 특정 환경 요구 사항을 충족해야 하는 경우 "예"를 선택합니다.
외부 자산운용사의 비준수 문제를 해결하기 위한 정책(2열) 
이 열은 열 1 "외부 자산 관리자는 선택 프로세스 및 계약의 일부로 특정 환경 요구 사항을 충족해야 합니다"에서 "예"를 선택한 경우에만 표시됩니다.
선택 프로세스 및 계약 내에서 환경 요구 사항을 준수하지 않는 외부 자산 관리자를 관리하기 위한 확립된 정책이 있는 경우 "예, 비준수 문제를 해결하기 위한 정책이 마련되어 있습니다"를 선택하십시오.
환경 요구 사항이 선택 프로세스 및 외부 자산 관리자와의 계약에 포함되지 않는 이유를 설명합니다(4열). 
귀사의 응답은 귀사에 구체적이어야 하며 귀사가 자산 관리자를 선택하고 협력할 때 환경 요구 사항을 고려하지 않는 이유를 포함해야 합니다.
앞으로 이 문제를 해결해야 할 계획이 있으면 간략하게 설명하십시오.

guidance.text: Investors include environmental requirements in the selection process and engagement with external asset managers.
guidance.textKo: 투자자는 선택 과정 및 외부 자산 관리자와의 참여에 환경 요구 사항을 포함합니다.

guidance.text:
External asset manager : wealth or investment manager that works independently from the reporting organization in the financial sector. 
Non-compliance : the state of not complying with or fulfilling (or only partially complying with or fulfilling) a given environmental requirement, standard, commitment, or target. In this context non-fulfilment of voluntary commitments, non-compliance with applicable environmental requirements, and adverse impacts to internationally recognized human rights are all considered instances of non-compliance (Adapted from AFi, 2024 ).
guidance.textKo:
외부 자산 관리자: 금융 부문에서 보고 기관과 독립적으로 일하는 자산 또는 투자 관리자입니다. 
비준수(Non-compliance): 주어진 환경 요구 사항, 표준, 약속 또는 목표를 준수하지 않거나 이행하지 않는(또는 부분적으로만 준수하거나 이행하는) 상태입니다. 이러한 맥락에서 자발적인 약속의 불이행, 적용 가능한 환경 요구 사항의 비준수, 국제적으로 인정된 인권에 대한 부정적인 영향은 모두 비준수 사례로 간주됩니다(AFi에서 채택, 2024).

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'External asset managers have to meet specific environmental requirements as part of the selection process and engagement' NOT completed - 0/6 points
A maximum of 0/6 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
ROUTE A)
Either 'Yes' OR 'No, but we plan to include environmental requirements in the next two years' selected in column 'External asset managers have to meet specific environmental requirements as part of the selection process and engagement' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No, and we do not plan to include environmental requirements in the next two years' selected in column 'External asset managers have to meet specific environmental requirements as part of the selection process and engagement' - 0/1 points
A maximum of 0/1 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'Not applicable, because we do not have externally managed assets' selected in column 'External asset managers have to meet specific environmental requirements as part of the selection process and engagement' - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'External asset managers have to meet specific environmental requirements as part of the selection process and engagement' NOT completed - 0/2 points
A maximum of 0/2 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
ROUTE A)
i) 'Yes' selected in column 'External asset managers have to meet specific environmental requirements as part of the selection process and engagement'- 1 point
ii) 'Yes, we have a policy in place for addressing non-compliance' is selected in column 'Policy in place for addressing external asset manager non-compliance' - 1 point
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No, but we plan to include environmental requirements in the next two years' selected in column 'External asset managers have to meet specific environmental requirements as part of the selection process and engagement' - 0.5/2 points
A maximum of 0.5/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'No, and we do not plan to include environmental requirements in the next two years' selected in column 'External asset managers have to meet specific environmental requirements as part of the selection process and engagement' - 0/2 points
A maximum of 0/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE D)
'Not applicable, because we do not have externally managed assets' selected in column 'External asset managers have to meet specific environmental requirements as part of the selection process and engagement ' - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'External asset managers have to meet specific environmental requirements as part of the selection process and engagement' NOT completed - 0/4 points
A maximum of 0/4 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '외부 자산 관리자가 귀사의 선정 과정 및 참여의 일환으로 환경 요구 사항을 충족해야 합니까?'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. CDP 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
translationSourceKo: CDP 국문 양식 기반 국문 보정
